---
title: "test_session_warden_determinism_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_session_warden_determinism_empire.py"
loc: 32
complexity: 4
logic_score: 5.07
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 8.90
overall_score: 5.32
---

## Intent
The `test_session_warden_determinism_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestSessionWardenDeterminismEmpire, setup_method, test_eval_mode_determinism, test_train_mode_stochasticity. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestSessionWardenDeterminismEmpire, setup_method, test_eval_mode_determinism, test_train_mode_stochasticity. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.atomic_gpt](file://src.core.engine.atomic_gpt)

### Exports
- `TestSessionWardenDeterminismEmpire`
- `setup_method`
- `test_eval_mode_determinism`
- `test_train_mode_stochasticity`
